title: AInvil Unity Bridge operational smoke validation
operationalUse: Read-only operational smoke scenario for proving AInvil can connect to a real Unity Editor through Unity Bridge and export non-sample validation evidence.
userGoal: Verify that AInvil can reach Unity Bridge, inspect editor status, check compile status, read console errors, inspect hierarchy, and export validation evidence without modifying the Unity project.

expectedDocuments.expected: The productization intent identifies Unity Bridge smoke validation as the minimum proof that AInvil can reach a real Unity project.
The scenario verifies Unity Bridge connectivity without depending on a project-specific game scene.
The task graph connects REQ-E2E-003, AC-E2E-002, Unity Bridge package setup, live harness execution, and evidence export.
Preferred runtime input bridge remains Codex.UnityBridge.AInvilRuntimeInputTestBridge, but this smoke test does not create scene objects.
The live harness exports operational evidence with bridge health, compile status, console summary, checked steps, failure reason, and next action.

validationChecks.expected: Unity Bridge health endpoint responds with JSON.
Compilation status can be read and reports no compile errors.
Console error logs can be read and summarized.
Active scene hierarchy can be inspected.
Active scene validation observation probe can be invoked.
Operational evidence is exported and linked to REQ-E2E-003 and AC-E2E-002.

passCriteria: Unity Bridge health endpoint is reachable.
At least one validation observation probe succeeds.
Operational evidence is written under validation/evidence.
